slices.title: Typed challenge vocabulary + honest canary port (B1+A1)

acceptance_criteria.text: StatusEnum StrEnum in models.ts; round-trips to its wire string; worker compares the enum, not a str literal
AuditSink protocol + NoOpAuditSink live in interfaces.ts; Worker param defaults to the no-op at the seam (no inline None branch)
FetchError.reason is required (no default); the _derive_reason validator is removed
every FetchError(...) site passes reason= explicitly (CHALLENGE for challenge_detected, OTHER elsewhere); mypy --strict clean; suite green
